prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `52df9849`.
codex_response:
Implemented `52df9849` as an ARC2 task package. The verifier completes each non-background color inside its own span: axis-aligned or diagonal traces are extended across gaps, and rectangle-like bands/L-shapes are filled to their full bounding boxes. Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced `1000` examples, generated-example verification passed `1000/1000`, and I sanity-checked `preview_01.png`.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` hint as too vague/misleading; that note is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_52df9849/notes.md). The generator stays close to the task family by keeping fixed `16x16` grids on background `7`, mixing line completions with rectangular band/L-shape completions and blocker rectangles. No new primitive was added.
